name: @driftgate/cli
description: DriftGate CLI for canonical V4 session and execution workflows.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --target node20 --platform node --dts --sourcemap --clean --tsconfig tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/index.js';const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!s.startsWith('#!/usr/bin/env node'))fs.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+s);"
